programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel's Goldfish Dies/ Daniel's Strawberry Seeds
programme.desc: When Daniel's fish dies, he asks questions that help him understand death.

programme.title: Sesame Street: The Big Pretend Band

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Monkey Dance/ Royal Peacock Dance
programme.desc: Pinkalicious and Peter are surprised when they find a monkey outside their treehouse; Pinkalicious' class is putting on a dance recital and whoever has the best posture gets to wear the crown.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Masterclass Three
programme.desc: Mary and Paul show their signature sponge puddings, flat breads, Wellingtons, sweet buns, and tarte Tatins.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Victoria: Uneasy Lies the Head That Wears the Crown

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pattern Seventeen

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Exchange

programme.title: Treadstone: The Cicada Covenant

programme.title: Treadstone: The Cicada Covenant

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Felonious Monk
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murders of four monks who were shot while chanting in a Buddhist temple. Catherine reopens a cold case in which her best friend was murdered, after the man convicted of the crime claims he's innocent shortly before he dies.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Windfall
programme.desc: When the team investigates a case involving a former marine who is being tracked down by members of al Qaeda for embezzling money from Iraq, Hetty assigns Nell to join Deeks in the field. Meanwhile, Eric is given a new partner in Ops.

programme.title: NCIS: Singled Out
programme.desc: The NCIS team is called to investigate a bloody, abandoned car registered to a missing navy lieutenant. After searching both the lieutenant's car and apartment, they learn that she had been profiling men in order to find herself the perfect mate.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Arrangement
programme.desc: A rivalry heats up during a floral competition which leads to an unlikely romance.

programme.title: Movie: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly has never introduced her toy designer boyfriend Connor to her family and has only revealed that they live 'up north.' Holly knows she can't wait any longer and decides to bring Conner to meet her parents for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: A photographer returns home for Christmas just as the annual holiday light show is resurrected. She volunteers to pitch in, but soon discovers her high-school sweetheart is also helping out.

programme.title: Movie: Wrapped Up in Christmas
programme.desc: A mall Santa is trying to find his way after quitting his job, until he meets an unfriendly Christmas Grinch in the form of the mall manager.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Corn-fed Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark and Digger contend with an unruly herd of cattle standing between them and their new still site. Tickle pulls Tim back to the woods to rediscover his roots on the outlaw side. Mike and Jerry devise a plan to access a perfectly hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Proof is in the Payoff
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes and rediscover their passion for outlaw moonshining. Mark Rogers designs a custom pot still to double distill shine he can sell for twice the price. Mark and Digger hand-build a copper mailbox still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: What Happens in the Woods
programme.desc: After returning to the backwoods, Tickle mashes in his first batch of illegal shine in six seasons. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn Sutton legacy mash before it spoils. With Daniel on the mend, Mike quietly takes on a new full-time partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Double Proof Double Cross
programme.desc: Tickle takes on his first big run of outlaw shine in over six years, but a new still design throws a wrench in the works. Mark and Huck seek a buyer willing to pay more for less. Daniel recovers from an on-the-job injury only to find he's been replaced.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Crossing County Lines
programme.desc: With Extra Shine bonus scenes: Mark and Digger go across county lines to bootleg their triple-grain shine. Mark Huck uses bear scent to track down an intruder while Mike and Jerry fire up the 24-jar rig and discover the downside of backpressure.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshiners xXxmas
programme.desc: Tim and JT team up with Tickle's mother and daughter to create a Christmas surprise while Chico and Sondra head out to shoot the Christmas turkey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rise 'n Shine!
programme.desc: Tim, Tickle and a few rookies are all going for a piece of a $100 million dollar jackpot. A new lawman in town has everyone walking on shells.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine Goldmine
programme.desc: Josh and Bill make a breakthrough on their underground still but eight tons of clay threatens to bury them alive. Mark and Jeff build a new copper still and head deep into the mountains to establish a new site. Tickle lures Tim back to their illegal site.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Renowned bear handler Jeff Watson says goodbye to his family and friends and sets out on an adventure into the wilderness of Southern Indiana. Out there, he will teach his two 700lb grizzly bears Bob and Screech how to survive on their own in the wild.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: To Teach a Bear to Fish
programme.desc: Jeff releases his bears, Bob and Screech into the habitat where he begins his lifelong dream of re-wilding them. However the first lesson, fishing, proves more difficult than Jeff imagined and Bob appears to be falling behind Screech.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: What About Bob?
programme.desc: Jeff teaches the bears to forage in the wild, but Bob's foot is still a concern. When the bear slashes Jeff in the arm he refuses medical care. After he loses the bears, Jeff is forced to think about the difficulty of them actually leaving the nest.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Bears on the Run
programme.desc: Jeff's unconventional hunting lessons fail to prepare Bob and Screech to hunt game in the wild, but he discovers they may be learning on their own. Meanwhile he reminisces about Grizzly Adams and agonizes over eventually parting ways with his bears.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Teenage Bears
programme.desc: Jeff is pleased with Bob and Screech learning how to feed themselves. Now he teaches them how to den up for the winter. The grizzlies get territorial when Jeff's friend steps inside their habitat.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Land of Monsters
programme.desc: Snake hunter Dusty Crum wages war on thousands of invasive pythons killing the Everglades, backed by his one-of-a-kind team of snake hunters.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Night Terror
programme.desc: Rival snake hunters encroach on Dusty's hunting spot, so he and his team take a major risk by day and night hunting deep in the dangerous Sawgrass Plains.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fists Full of Snakes
programme.desc: Dusty and his team mount a critical hunt from a swamp buggy before racing south to the python-infested Ten Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Snakes in the Dark
programme.desc: Dusty leads the team to an abandoned missile factory near the epicenter of the snake epidemic that could hold the biggest concentration of pythons in the Everglades.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Enter the Super Snake
programme.desc: Dusty and team discover a frightening new hybrid Python species when they trek deep into the dense Python Pines to prevent the snakes from laying their eggs.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Candle Bar
programme.desc: Melissa and her groom share their love at a Hollywood inspired affair, while Laura's waterside wedding is accented with Penn State flair. Audrianna's guests enjoy the glamour at her boat house venue and Dee's guests make their own favours at a candle bar.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Stingray
programme.desc: Emily goes back in time at her American Main Street nuptials, while Jessica exchanges vows at a historic New Orleans Landmark.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Fist Pumping
programme.desc: Lori's rumba and salsa first dance gets her celebration started; Shannon's 'Jersey Shore' theme has fists pumping all night.

programme.desc: Russ and Pao struggle to get back on track; Loren and Alex deliver sad news to his mom; Chantel discovers that Pedro has been keeping secrets.

programme.desc: The quints have their first sleepover at the Mills when the Busbys are forced to leave their home for a few days. Fearing for the girls' health after prolonged exposure to mold, Danielle and Adam bring them to the doctor to find out if they are at risk.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Quints Get Schooled
programme.desc: Thanksgiving is right around the corner, but celebrating is the last thing on the Busbys' minds. Tensions run high between Adam and Danielle as they continue the hunt for a new house and the quints undergo their first school testing.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Chrystie and Treasure
programme.desc: Chrystie, a newcomer to couponing, has a stockpile that is slowly taking over every spare space in her small home. Meanwhile, Treasure started couponing to save the family business, but now has a stockpile worth over $35,000.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Michelle and Tyler
programme.desc: Michelle uses her coupon savings to build a dream home for her family. College student Tyler hopes to impress his mom with his couponing skills.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Cole and Angelique
programme.desc: Cole enlists his ex-girlfriend to help on a vital shopping trip, but her antics in the store impede his haul.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: April and Chasity
programme.desc: Georgia's April and Chasity are best friends and couponing partners who are saving up for new stockpile storage buildings.

programme.desc: A woman hears a message from her deceased husband that no one else would know.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: The Patient
programme.desc: A couple hears from their deceased child in one of Theresa's most powerful group readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Construction Zone
programme.desc: Theresa decides to do work on the house because of mold. However Larry has no idea how big the project actually is.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Shoo Shoo Spirit

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man

programme.title: Chopped: In-Laws, In Teams!

programme.desc: The four competing chefs get budget baskets full of low-cost ingredients for every round, and they have to make basic foods burst with flavour.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: The wardens encounter all types of people willing to stretch the truth to get out of hot water. Warden Parker searches for a trigger-happy shooter in a family neighborhood. Sergeant Spahr and Warden Lounder investigate a suspiciously shot turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Officer Eric Hannett and Officer Bill Boudreau chase down a likely deer poacher. Officer Glen Lucas makes a dangerous trek to the summit of Mt. Washington to rescue a stranded and injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Seeking Shelter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter without a permit, while Sgt. Lucas heads to a questionable deer kill site. Officer Holmes tries to extract a raccoon from a chimney and Officer Pierre executes his first under-ice recovery dive.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: Officer Jim Cyrs and Lt. Saunders rush to the scene of an ATV accident. Officer James Benvenuti works with K-9 Cora to track down a suspect. Officer Eric Hannett gets backup from Lieutenant Bill Boudreau when dealing with a suspicious fisherman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Seeking Shelter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter without a permit, while Sgt. Lucas heads to a questionable deer kill site. Officer Holmes tries to extract a raccoon from a chimney and Officer Pierre executes his first under-ice recovery dive.

programme.desc: Officer Jim Cyrs and Lt. Saunders rush to the scene of an ATV accident. Officer James Benvenuti works with K-9 Cora to track down a suspect. Officer Eric Hannett gets backup from Lieutenant Bill Boudreau when dealing with a suspicious fisherman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Dangerous Africans
programme.desc: Steve travels through Africa on foot to study some of the most notoriously dangerous African animals. He is charged by huge elephants, rolls up to a massive herd of buffalo, intimidates a pride of lions and is chased by large hippos.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Pocket Pets
programme.desc: See the world of puppies and kittens like never before.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Reese the Ripper
programme.desc: George and Beth consider their cat, Reese, to be the feline version of Jack the Ripper. One of his favourite targets happens to be Beth.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff operates on a dog rushed to the clinic after a growth on her neck ruptures. A family brings in their rabbit with mysterious growths on her side. The team performs a risky procedure on a pair of rescued miniature donkeys.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Dog Ate My Shorts
programme.desc: Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts. Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament and Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. The vets treat Cy-Fair to a crawfish boil.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Rhino Surprise
programme.desc: Rhino Asha is pregnant by partner, Beni. When keepers go home for the night, Asha goes into labour and there's a surprise awaiting them when they arrive at work the next morning.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Orleans, Here We Come
programme.desc: It's a whole new world for Tia, her family, the parolees, and most importantly, her pitbulls, when they pack up their lives and moves across country to New Orleans. But the move is only the first of many challenges Tia faces.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Face Off
programme.desc: Tia meets a family of eight looking to adopt a new dog after losing theirs to cancer. Then, a rescue-call takes Tia and her daughter Tania into New Orleans’s infamous ninth war to face off with a snarling, sick dog.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Born Into Bad News

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: All Cylinders Firing

programme.desc: When a car plows through a crowd of concert-goers and gunfire erupts, Lindsay and Ruzek are on the scene. Unsure of the motive and concerned about terrorism, they order Homeland Security to assist in the investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Some Friend

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Paper Soldiers

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Modern Family Murder

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Dying to See You

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Exchange

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Full Moon
programme.desc: A Las Vegas cocktail waitress and loving mother is murdered in her home, leading authorities to wonder if there was a predator at large. When detectives find the killer, it is clear that their investigation is just getting started.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Sister's Search
programme.desc: Aasha Davis moved to Hollywood with big dreams. Her sister Lesley followed for support. Then, Lesley went missing and Aasha was desperate to find her. In a town built on deception, police came up with a high-stakes plan to smoke out their suspect.

programme.title: Snapped: Ruby Ann Ruffolo

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Call of the Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Tell-Tale Head
programme.desc: To impress bad kids from school, Bart cuts off the head of Jebediah Springfield's statue.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Some Enchanted Evening

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets an 'F'

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Kangaroo-mance
programme.desc: Young kangaroo Fergus gets a gut check in the love department.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Incredible Mr. Quackerson
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, his son Charles and Dr. Brenda try to keep up with an onslaught puppies, kittens and calves before operating on two 1,600 pound cows.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol Speed Ahead
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and Charles rush to save a mother mare and foal and then help a dog with a badly slit throat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goats Gone Wild
programme.desc: Dr. Pol keeps busy as the unofficial vet for the town's county fair. The clinic helps Timmy, a goat with a blocked esophagus and Cooter, a hound dog with a bite from battling with another dog.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Raging Bulls
programme.desc: Charles is determined to upgrade the computer system at the clinic while Dr. Pol deals with escaping cattle, a wobbly dog that won’t stop walking in circles and an alligator with an attitude.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ark of the Covenant: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence discovered using the latest science might lead to one of the greatest discoveries of all time: the true hiding place of the Ark of the Covenant. Experts investigate the secret history of this biblical relic.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ark of the Covenant: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence discovered using the latest science might lead to one of the greatest discoveries of all time: the true hiding place of the Ark of the Covenant. Experts investigate the secret history of this biblical relic.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Katrina Struck
programme.desc: Hurricane Katrina is one of the worst natural disasters to ever strike American soil, but as the storm revealed widespread construction failures, it's a tragedy of engineering, too; the latest science reveals how.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: NASA's Challenger Disaster
programme.desc: NASA's Space Shuttle Challenger was a deadly disaster that changed the course of space exploration forever, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the structural failure that tore the rocket apart.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Doom on the Titanic
programme.desc: New discoveries are challenging everything we know about the sinking of the Titanic, revealing that the disaster wasn't caused by a freak accident and that it may have been doomed from the start.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Fireball From Hell
programme.desc: When a series of accidental explosions erupt at a chemical factory, they completely destroy the area nearby, and now, new discoveries the real reasons behind the deadly chemical fireball that left a giant crater where there was once a building.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Trains Collide
programme.desc: After a high-speed collision of three trains during morning rush hour in London causes dozens of deaths, experts use the latest technology to investigate what caused this catastrophic crash and what secrets could prevent future disasters.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: In Austin, Texas, a man is shot by someone he trusts and Kim and Audrey must wait until the gunman is apprehended before they can begin treatment.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams: Laci Peterson

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection

programme.title: See No Evil: Right Man, Wrong Man

programme.title: See No Evil: Beth's Last Party

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Look of Summer
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a Texas landfill, detectives race to discover the killer behind the brutal crime. With no leads, police turn to their only witnesses: video cameras that captured the murderer's chilling attempt to cover his tracks.

programme.title: His Last Christmas
programme.desc: When Dean Fawcett disappears a few days after Christmas and his frozen body is found weeks later, a handwritten note found on his person will be the clue that leads detectives on a country-wide manhunt for his killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Churchside Killer
programme.desc: Single mother of two, Kenyadda Patterson, works two jobs and goes to college at night in addition to raising her children. When she is discovered murdered, detectives hunt down the killer, and discover he's closer to her than they could imagine.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.desc: Single mother of two, Kenyadda Patterson, works two jobs and goes to college at night in addition to raising her children. When she is discovered murdered, detectives hunt down the killer, and discover he's closer to her than they could imagine.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: His Last Christmas
programme.desc: When Dean Fawcett disappears a few days after Christmas and his frozen body is found weeks later, a handwritten note found on his person will be the clue that leads detectives on a country-wide manhunt for his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Good Samaritan
programme.desc: Bright young college student Kenia Monge disappears without a trace. The family's search for their 19-year-old daughter hits every dead end... until detectives uncover chilling surveillance footage, revealing exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: See No Evil: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: On October 26th, 2009, widower Philip Gatusso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo, North Dakota. As his in-laws drive across states to care for their now orphaned granddaughter, detectives to turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: No Easy Road
programme.desc: In November 2009, Bo McNeely hitches a ride with C.J. Harvey at a truck stop. The two become fast friends. But when Harvey takes Bo home to his wife and their four boys, Bo realizes he's stepped into a meth den and the visit spirals out of control.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Rose Amongst Thorns
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing and the short list of suspects in her disappearance leads right to her own backyard.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: The police rescue Jennifer from her abusive boyfriend, who has been holding her in a hotel room. The boyfriend becomes obsessive and begins to chase after her, murdering several people in his path.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Dangerous Intersection
programme.desc: A report on the curious relationship and crazy coincidences that started with a chance traffic encounter, and ended with the killing of a beloved mother of four, Tammy Myers.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Only Two Remain
programme.desc: A husband is bludgeoned to death in his home. His wife and father-in-law claim it was self-defense. But when investigators take a closer at the crime scene, the story of what really happened that night will be put into question.

programme.title: Barbara Walters Presents: American Scandals: Gary Hart and Donna Rice: The Scandal that Changed History
programme.desc: In 1987, Gary Hart seemed a sure bet to be the next President until the press accused him of an affair with beautiful Donna Rice. Barbara Walters looks at the political sex scandal that changed history-what she finds will shock you.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love Goes South
programme.desc: Lonely musician Ray Merrill thinks he's found his dream woman in Brazil through an online dating website. But as the exotic romance heats up, money starts to go missing.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Child Network
programme.desc: A woman adopts a 6-year-old on an online re-homing forum for children. She's soon inspired to help re-home other children, but is horrified when she discovers two of the children may have fallen into the clutches of a child abuser.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Final Sale
programme.desc: 50-year-old Beverly Carter is an internet savvy real-estate agent, but when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she goes missing. The search for Beverly goes viral, but depends on unravelling a web of false identities and fake clues.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Blast from the Past
programme.desc: 38-year-old Michele Reiter's life seems to be on the up after a chaotic marriage and a troubled romance. But when Michele goes missing after accepting a date from a new Facebook friend, a horrific story unfolds.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: A daughter and mother call on Brett to restore a 1927 arts and crafts house that's lost some character over the years. While restoring the home, Brett unexpectedly discovers a hidden masterpiece.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Dakota A-Frame

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Den
programme.desc: Beau Dunavant bought a piece of land in Tres Piedras, New Mexico, as a gift for his girlfriend, Samantha Inman, where they can build a home made of mostly recycled materials and lots of dirt.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Tree Lovin' Yurts
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny are challenged with building a completely unique, tree-themed yurt. The Beschens decide on a large, 30-foot yurt and request other yurt firsts such as a private, walled-off master bedroom and the largest dormer they've ever built.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Yurt in Paradise
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny use a rare wood only found in Hawaii to build a yurt on a farm for clients determined to live completely of the grid.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Yurt on the Edge
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny build their biggest kitchen yet for a young couple who has chosen a yurt to be their first home. But, their land is on a steep hill and that causes some big design challenges.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Oahu Living on a Tiny Budget
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny are challenged with building a completely unique yurt on Oahu, Hawaii.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Totally Modular Yurt
programme.desc: A young couple gets creative designing a yurt with modular features. They pull out all the stops to give each piece its own unique design, using everything from beach glass and colored epoxy to a mattress and a turkey carver.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Yurt in the Rainforest
programme.desc: A hula instructor and drum maker are looking to build a yurt on their Oahu property. Rain and mud slows the build down, and Nathan and Jenny fight against the clock and the elements to complete the yurt on time.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Ranch Yurt
programme.desc: Jenny and Nathan head to Waimanalo, Oahu, to build a country-themed yurt on a horse ranch for a couple moving out of their apartment.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Pop the Top
programme.desc: With their growing family getting bigger by the day, Nathan and Jenny decide it's time to grow their yurt with them. They may have bitten off more than they can chew, however, with only five days to complete their project.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Nathan's Dream Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny design the ultimate man cave for a musician and his friend. They go all out, giving the yurt indoor skate ramps, a refurbished pool table and a stage complete with drums and guitars.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Jewel of a Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny design a new home for a jewelry maker and her son. The team will have to pull an all nighter to complete the yurt on time after fierce rains and a mismeasurement put the build far behind schedule.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Nautical Yurt
programme.desc: A couple with a love for the ocean is looking for a yurt, and Nathan and Jenny are up to the task. The build schedule is put at risk, however, when Jenny loses her voice and rain pours in while the yurt goes up.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Two Yurts and a Gazebo
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny work with a couple who want a 30-foot yurt with a loft, a gazebo and a smaller yurt bathroom. The huge project is on a tight, one-week deadline and an even tighter $60,000 budget.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Three-Alarm Fire
programme.desc: Roger visits Faith's Farm in Bonfield, IL for an awesome feast cooked on three different fiery contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Trucks
programme.desc: Big Red Rig, a bright red, double-decker, thirty-foot trailer tricked out with two massive smokers cooking traditional pulled pork.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing For Fire
programme.desc: In a pit, under a kettle, or in between hunks of heavy metal, Roger's showing off three flame-licking good feasts that are packing high heat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat In Full Swing
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets up with a few culinary titans in Tennessee who are swinging for the fences with outrageous rigs. At Wedge Oak Farm in Lebanon, Tenn., he joins Chef Trey Cioccia, owner of Nashville's Black Rabbit, to set up the Burn Tower.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the most creative chefs in the U.S. to get their mouthwatering secrets for meaty celebrations that include whole hog barbecue, buffalo meatloaf and more.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers. Join Ralph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey as they master new weapons, battle absurd mutants and discover a hidden city beneath New York.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crocker Shocker/ Super Zero
programme.desc: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies; Cosmo becomes a superhero.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Boys in the Band/ Hex Games
programme.desc: Vicky has kidnapped teen singing sensation Chip Skylark, and a stadium full of screaming girls is going to tear the town apart if he doesn't perform for them. Timmy challenges Vicky as Queen of the Skatepark.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Gift/ Theo Knows Best
programme.desc: Theodore gives Dave an ugly handmade vest for his birthday and insists he wear it to an upcoming business meeting. When Theodore finds a winning lottery ticket, everyone has their own ideas on how the money should be spent.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theo's Big Night Out/ The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleep-overs by spending the night at Kevin's house without Alvin or Simon. When Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Let Sleeper Dogs Lie/ Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Crocker tries to trigger Sparky with a secret word. Catman confuses Sparky for his old arch-nemesis Dogman.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Ruled Out/ That's Life
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for parents who won't care about rules; Timmy brings a garden to life.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Sister Sam / Perfect Chemistry
programme.desc: Patrick's big sister Samantha comes for a visit; Sandy and Plankton bond over their shared love of science.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Staycation/ Walking the Plankton
programme.desc: Patrick wants to take a vacation, but can't afford one, so SpongeBob comes up with a solution: a staycation.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Ghoul Fools
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get caught in the feud between a crew of ghost pirates and the Flying Dutchman.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Ian Malcolm returns to the island to help with strange power surges throughout the park.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubble Trouble / The Way of the Sponge
programme.desc: Sandy's air supply is destroyed; SpongeBob wants to earn his karate belt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob/ Fiasco

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Free Samples / Home Sweet Rubble

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: Crow's Bucket List

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: A Major Baptism
programme.desc: King and Zonnique express a desire to be baptized. However, the idea of Major joining in comes to a halt when he reveals a phobia to water. Meanwhile, Tip is tasked with preparing his family friend Crow for an epic first date.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: A Major Project
programme.desc: With a school project due, Major asks his pops for help. But when Tip and other family members become too involved, a discouraged Major is left to do the project his own way. Meanwhile, King has written a children's book.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: A Major Sport
programme.desc: T.I. and Tiny decide it's time to introduce athletics into Major's life as an alternative to video games. Meanwhile, Tiny takes a meeting with a social-media comedian that has more than just a meeting in store for her.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: Where's Major?
programme.desc: With the recent passing of her nephew, Tiny meets with a medium in hopes of gaining closure. Meanwhile, with his oldest boys not paying attention, T.I. devises a plan that will hopefully scare the boys straight.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: Stuntin'
programme.desc: Tameka makes an effort to find fun, aerobic activities for herself, Zonnique, Ms. Diane and Precious. Meanwhile, in an effort to prevent his boys from damaging his home and personal possessions, T.I. arranges stunt classes.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: It's a Yard Sale
programme.desc: The Harris kids host a garage sale, selling old things in the house, not excluding Tip's most valued possessions. Meanwhile, as Zonnique begins a career on her own, she's faced with the challenge of her first solo music video.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: Blackmail
programme.desc: T.I.'s comedian sidekick K-Dubb exploits an opportunity to trade his silence about a broken vase for miscellaneous favors. Tiny and her long-time friend Toya are challenged to a lip -sync battle by their adolescent daughters.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle: The Announcement
programme.desc: In the season finale, Tameka makes an epic reveal to the family that will change all of their lives forever.

programme.title: Movie: A Crown for Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Hallmark Hall of Fame: A Christmas Love Story

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: An interior designer is made-of-honour at her friend’s wedding. Before the big day, she ends up stranded in the Christmas Cottage, where rumour has it, all guests will find everlasting love, with the brother of the bride.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Secret

programme.title: Movie: Sleigh Bells Ring

programme.title: Movie: It's Christmas, Eve

programme.desc: An advertising executive lands her dream assignment organizing the perfect Christmas wedding for a fashion magazine. She finds that she has unknowingly been paired with her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: A Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Newlywed couple celebrates their first Christmas by inviting their families to join them. When he gets laid off and she finds out she is pregnant, they try and keep their secrets hidden to have a smooth holiday.

programme.desc: Newlyweds Jessica and Matthew Boynton seemed like the picture-perfect couple until the young mother is found unresponsive and covered in blood inside her locked bedroom closet, and doesn't remember how she ended up there.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash

programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Call to Duty

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Home Alone

programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Getting Glasses With Magenta

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Feathery Playdate/ Ryan's Spectacular Playdate
programme.desc: Ryan leaves the nest and must be light as a feather to complete his challenges. Ryan must complete his big top challenges before meeting his playdate in the center ring.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside

programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and accidentally break her latest hideous vase. When Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Gumball catches Darwin gazing wistfully at a photo of Teri on Elmore Plus and secretly enlists Carrie to help bring them together.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Cryptonite
programme.desc: Emotions run deep when Danny receives an astronomical offer for one of his prized cars. Kevin helps spot an epic flip that brings in a ton of cash, and the guys visit SEMA, the world's biggest and most extravagant auto show.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Rockabilly Roadster
programme.desc: Danny and the boys give away a perfect hot rod at the annual Rockabilly Reunion at Lake Havasu. Later, a lady biker stuns the boys with a custom order for the bike of her dreams.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Soap Box

programme.title: Counting Cars: Rocked and Loaded
programme.desc: Country rocker Andy Ross wants Danny to build the world's most patriotic muscle car ever made. Will a Second Amendment-inspired hot rod Corvette do the trick? Meanwhile, Roli blackmails Horny Mike into teaching him how to airbrush.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fighting Ford
programme.desc: Danny has a customer who wants to restore a 1942 Ford truck that saw some action in WWII. But when Danny takes in the project, he quickly learns it'll need a lot more love than he thought. Roli and Ryan check out a '71 Duster.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fighting Ford
programme.desc: The shop has its hands full restoring a 1942 Ford truck that needed a lot of TLC and a special touch for the owner's wife. Danny and Ryan check out a badass 1929 Ford Roadster, while Gary pulls one over on Mike in the paint shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Power and Glory
programme.desc: When Mark asks Danny to build a bike in memory of eight sailors who were lost while serving with him on the USS Belknap, Danny knows he must create something special in their honour. Later, Danny finds a beautiful, rare Corvette in a driveway.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Firebird Fever
programme.desc: 'Engine Whisperer' Doc has a cool '67 Firebird he's been working on. While he's a mechanical maestro under the hood, his paint skills are lacking so he enlists Ryan to make it look as mean as it will run. Danny checks out a one-of-a-kind car collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: Count's Car Show
programme.desc: Danny hosts a car show in which a restored '73 boat tail Riviera is the main attraction. Although Mike is in the doghouse, he wants to get in on the restoration of the Riviera. While looking for a gasser, Danny finds a collection of muscle cars.

programme.title: Counting Cars: True Fire Fiasco
programme.desc: A memorial bike project poses a series of challenges for the paint team after builder Shannon doesn't get all the necessary information from the customer. Also, Danny stumbles upon a collection of seriously fast rides.

programme.title: Counting Cars: One Sweet 'Stang
programme.desc: Danny scores a 1967 Mustang that he hopes he can turn into another Count's Kustoms masterpiece. He visits a local muscle car collection for inspiration, and later brings in an expert from the Shelby headquarters for a seal of approval.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mangled Mustang
programme.desc: Danny gets hired to do a full bumper-to-bumper restoration on a '66 Mustang Convertible. Unfortunately, when the car is stripped down, they find there's not a whole lot of car between the bumpers.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mangled Mustang
programme.desc: Danny and the team continue wrestling with the stock restoration Mustang mess, hoping for some extra funds and a lot of patience from their client.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tommy Lee's Chopper
programme.desc: When Tommy Lee's beloved bike gets crushed in an accident, he turns to the only person he trusts to fix it: the guys who built it, Count's Kustoms. Danny and Ryan take in a cool collection to cheer them up after seeing Tommy's smashed bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: CHiPs Bike
programme.desc: Kevin's brother Steve wants a 1980 Kawasaki KZ100 motorcycle tricked out just like the ones on the classic TV series, CHiPs. He and Danny try to keep the project a secret, but Kevin finds out and plans a surprise of his own.

programme.desc: Homer decides to forgo church and starts his own religion by spending Sundays reading Playdude and smoking cigars.

programme.desc: Bart receives an evil talking Krusty doll as a present and later raises the dead.
