programme.desc: Marge and Homer ground Bart for his bad behaviour in school, causing him to miss the new Itchy and Scratchy movie when it comes out.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Gets a Job
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Marge gets a job at the Springfield Nuclear Power Plant and Mr. Burns promptly falls in love with her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: New Kid on the Block
programme.desc: Feelings aren't mutual when Bart falls hard for Evergreen Terrace's newest neighbour, Laura, who only thinks of Bart as her little friend.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mr. Plow
programme.desc: Homer becomes Mr. Plow but competition gets out of hand when Barney gets in on the action.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's First Word
programme.desc: Flashbacks reveal that Lisa's first word was 'Bart,' which always secretly broke Homer's heart, who hoped her first word would be 'Daddy.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Triple Bypass
programme.desc: Homer's heart is dangerously clogged with plaque and doughnut residue but he can't afford triple bypass surgery. He is forced to have his surgery performed by hack Dr. Nick Riviera, who loses his nerve during the operation and relies on Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge vs. the Monorail
programme.desc: It's Marge versus the residents of Springfield when she disapproves of the construction of a completely useless monorail in town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Selma's Choice
programme.desc: Aunt Selma realizes that she might wind up dying alone and thinks that having a baby can relieve her loneliness. She decides to test this theory by taking Bart and Lisa to the park, with disastrous results.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brother From the Same Planet
programme.desc: Miffed, Bart goes to a Big Brother agency claiming he's an abandoned child and looking for a new 'father' after Homer leaves him waiting in the pouring rain after soccer practice.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Love Lisa
programme.desc: Lisa gives Ralph Wiggum a Valentine's Day card, and Ralph assumes that she's in love with him. Lisa tries to let him down nicely, but Ralph won't get the hint until she yells at him in front of a live studio audience at the Krusty the Clown special.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Duffless
programme.desc: Lisa conducts a secret experiment for the Springfield Elementary School science fair to see who's smarter, Bart or a hamster. Meanwhile, Homer is forced to swear off beer after being arrested on a D.U.I.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Last Exit to Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons: So It's Come to This: A Simpsons Clip Show
programme.desc: Remembering Homer's life after he is injured by Bart's April Fool's Day prank.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Front

programme.title: The Simpsons: Whacking Day
programme.desc: Everyone in Springfield is excited for Whacking Day, a decade-long tradition which calls for the townspeople to beat snakes to death with sticks. But leave it to Lisa to spoil the town's fun when she condemns the holiday as violent.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge in Chains
programme.desc: Marge gets busted for shoplifting at the Kiwk-E-Mart and is sentenced to 30 days in prison. Bart concocts a brilliant scheme to break her out of jail that involves a party dress, a wig and a crowbar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Krusty Gets Kancelled

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Barbershop Quartet

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cape Feare

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to College
programme.desc: Homer fails a competency test and must go back to college to keep his job. At college, he selects the nerds and the crusty Dean as his mortal enemies based on his preconceived notions of what college is like from old 1980s films.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rosebud
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns wants to get his favourite stuffed bear, Bobo, back from Maggie Simpson, he offers Homer one million dollars and three Hawaiian islands in exchange for the toy. Meanwhile, Smithers organizes a birthday party for Mr. Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror IV

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Inner Child

programme.title: The Simpsons: Boy Scoutz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: After drinking a very sugary beverage, Bart awakens with no memory of what happened and discovers he has joined a boy scout troop. Bart and Homer reluctantly take a father-son river rafting trip that has them encountering disaster in every turn.

programme.desc: When an oil rig in a Louisiana lake drills in the wrong place, it causes a massive whirlpool that drains the entire lake; experts investigate why this sinkhole disaster was one of the greatest engineering catastrophes in American history.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Catastrophic Collapse
programme.desc: Over 1,000 people die when an eight-story factory suddenly collapses in one the deadliest engineering disasters in modern history. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal what went wrong, and how to prevent the next catastrophe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Treasure of the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Strange spots near the Grand Canyon may hold clues to the legendary treasure of a notorious bandit. Satellite images could explain desert ruins rumored to be an entrance to an underworld. A city-size chunk of ice suddenly disappears in Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Empire of the Amazon
programme.desc: New evidence could lead to the discovery of an unknown ancient civilization in the Amazon rainforest. An island disappears, and investigators are mystified. An unidentified submarine is spotted in a North Korean shipyard.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Desert Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Hundreds of shipwrecks are found in the middle of a desert in Africa. Then, visit a ghost town where hundreds of its inhabitants have mysteriously died. Also, something strange happens in North Korea.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Curse of Death Island
programme.desc: A team of expert archaeologists are hot on the trail of the legendary Viking utopia of the Americas, and clues from the ancient Sagas lead them to a mysterious, hostile island with a deadly past.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: The Alaska Enigma
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that the Vikings of North America didn't just disappear, but might have traveled further into American than anyone ever imagined, and using the latest tech, experts put this shocking theory to the test.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: The Spreckels Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: World famous prosecutor, Marcia Clark, dissects the suspicious death of Rebecca Zahau, girlfriend of multi-millionaire pharmaceutical tycoon, Jonah Shaknai. When Rebecca's body was found, law enforcement determined her death was a suicide.

programme.desc: Toney and his team respond to Memphis's worst mass murder in more than 15 years.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Sister Load
programme.desc: The seizure of 350 pounds of marijuana leads the unit to a similar sister load coming from Mexico.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The New C
programme.desc: A new informant is willing to give up vital information about dealers in exchange for help with his legal troubles.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Ledger
programme.desc: LPD Narcotics busts a stash house holding cocaine and guns, plus a ledger filled with information that could help end a heavy cocaine operation.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Crime 360: Full House

programme.title: Deadly Women: Ditched and Desperate
programme.desc: Breaking up is never easy but it can be murder.

programme.desc: Money is the driving force behind many crimes, especially murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people's babies - they spilt Blood for Money.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Beauty and the Beastly
programme.desc: Sometimes beauty can mask the ugliest of truths.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Family Tragedy
programme.desc: Home is where the heart is and a killer lurks.

programme.title: Murder on Christmas Morning
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery on Christmas morning leads police on a six-year hunt for a murderer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: High in the mountains above Colorado Springs, a woman's frozen body is found along a switchback road. Before investigators can determine who's responsible for her death, they'll need to figure out what brought her here in the first place.

programme.title: Shattered: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2009, one woman's long and painful struggle to overcome addiction and help others ends in a way no one ever saw coming.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don't add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt for a secret eyewitness they've heard could crack the case wide open.

programme.title: Murder on Christmas Morning
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery on Christmas morning leads police on a six-year hunt for a murderer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Pine Hill Massacre
programme.desc: When Bill and Catherine Stuart are executed in their home along with their three-year-old daughter, police look to the surviving daughter Miriam for clues. Her description of the killer leads detectives deep into Philadelphia's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Homicide City: A Russian Tragedy
programme.desc: When Russian mortgage broker Fay Zonis is found murdered in her office, for seemingly no reason, it sends chills through Philadelphia's Russian-American community. As detectives hone in her killer, the investigation sends shockwaves around the world.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Football Fatale
programme.desc: Star Washington Redskins safety Sean Taylor is shot dead by an intruder in his Miami home. And when it comes to the rich and famous, it seems like everybody has a motive...

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: Wisconsin police are shocked in 2010 to find an elderly couple brutally murdered in their home. When family and neighbors start receiving death threats, police fear the killer isn't done. Can they solve the case before they strike again?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Film director Adrienne Shelly is discovered hanging by a bed sheet from the shower rod in her bathroom. It looks like a suicide, but her husband insists it was murder. And detectives are starting to believe him...

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the death of a young wife and wonder if she committed suicide to be free from a sham marriage or did someone in her husband's alleged religious cult want her dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Clown Did It
programme.desc: Nearly three decades after a woman was shot in her Palm Beach County, Fla., home by someone wearing a clown costume, two people who were there describe what they saw in this interview.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dear Savanna
programme.desc: Dorothy Lee Barnett eluded the FBI for two decades after she fled the United States with her infant daughter in tow. Now, for the first time, Barnett shares her story with us.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: From the Mouths of Babes
programme.desc: When 38-year-old Rhonda Boggs doesn't show up for work outside Columbus, Ohio, a concerned co-worker checking on her home is met by Rhonda's two year old daughter -- unharmed but smeared with her mother's blood.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: The Lawyer, The Dancer, and The Hitman
programme.desc: Financial desperation in the down-turned market sends a real estate lawyer to meet a mystery investor who swears to solve all his problems. But when the encounter turns deadly, an exotic dancer may be the only person willing to tell the truth.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Small Town Girl, Big City Murder
programme.desc: A 22-year-old woman moves from a small town in Arkansas to St. Louis, Missouri to spread her wings and conquer bigger things, but then she turns up dead on the floor of her apartment.

programme.title: American Monster: Just Out of Frame
programme.desc: A fun-loving couple, both business-owners, share a close relationship with their grown daughters. So when the mother is found gruesomely bludgeoned to death in her own home, no one suspects the unthinkable. But unlike guilty people, video doesn't lie.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Alaska Off the Grid: Lee Raymond's Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Lee Raymond has just three months to wrangle the wild Alaska shoreline into a dream 2,800-square-foot fishing cabin. There are no trips to the store here, the only way in or out is via floatplane or helicopter.

programme.title: Alaska Off the Grid: Derek Galbraith's Ski Cabin
programme.desc: Derek and his friends pool their resources and talents together to build their dream ski-in, ski-out cabin near some of the best skiing in the work. They have three weeks to build, tear down, and transport over 20,000 pounds of logs and materials.

programme.title: Alaska Off the Grid: Creig Butler's Hunting Retreat
programme.desc: Alaska Master Guide, Creig Butler, fulfills his lifelong dream of building a bear complex in the outer reaches of Alaska. A near attack on one of his crew members along with a shocking fall threatens his entire build.

programme.title: Alaska Off the Grid: Tom Shankster's Guest Cabin
programme.desc: Tom Shankster and his team of hunters and guides are building a 1,400-square-foot guest cabin on the Dillinger River. This fly-in-only location is prime real estate for moose, sheep, caribou, and grizzly bears making it a hunter's dream location.

programme.title: Alaska Off the Grid: Tony Malone's Getaway Cabin
programme.desc: Tony Malone has four weeks to redeem his reputation and build a 624-square-foot getaway cabin in the remote woods, miles outside of Haines, Alaska. Battling poor road conditions and relentless rain, it's a make or break build.

programme.title: Alaska Off the Grid: Dave Bartlett's Island Retreat
programme.desc: Dave Bartlett and Hans Moser are building an 832-square-foot beachside retreat on a remote island 15 miles off the coast of Juneau, Alaska.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Hunting For the Next VIP
programme.desc: Vanilla Ice and his number one ninja, Wes search Palm Beach, Florida for their next big project. They check out 4 unique properties from an oceanside mansion to a sprawling ranch, hoping to find a diamond in the rough.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Views From the Great Room
programme.desc: The main entrance of the house opens into the Great Room, making this space very important to Rob since he wants to wow all the visitors. He opens the space up and extends it to the water.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Suite Dreams
programme.desc: Rob and his ninjas transform the master bedroom into a massive room fit for a king. Elegant hardwood floors, wallpaper, a custom fireplace and floor to ceiling windows will prove challenging to install, but worth the work.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Infinity and Beyond
programme.desc: The pool at Rob's latest project leaves much to be desired, it's small, enclosed and boring, which is a huge mistake on this lake front property because it obscures the beautiful view. Rob rips off the enclosure and gets to work.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Kicking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: The kitchen and dining room at Rob's latest lakeside retreat are bland, boring and plain. Rob wants to have an open floor plan in his kitchen, so he knocks out several walls to bring it up to date.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Bubbles Causing Troubles
programme.desc: Rob wants to go big with this master suite bathroom -- so big, in fact, that he's blowing out walls to create a luxe master bathroom and walk-in closet.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Old Town Grub
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Alexandria, VA: for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack! Ali kicks things off in style with a guilt free southern fried chicken biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chowin' Down In Portland
programme.desc: Food blogger, Ali Khan, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Portland.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Stuffed In Spokane
programme.desc: Ali breaks his fast with a farm-to-food truck twist on the classic P.B.& J in Spokane.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Music City Munchies
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Nashville for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. Ali kicks things off with a cheesy hash brown casserole covered breakfast weenie.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale of Two BBQs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smokin' Sides and Sweets
programme.desc: No cookout is complete without some outrageous side dishes and craveworthy desserts, so Roger Mooking is putting the main course aside to honor everything that tops off the best barbecue meals.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Extreme
programme.desc: It's time to go big or go home with Roger Mooking as he explores the most extreme dishes. The featured chefs are creating the most jaw-dropping, spectacular dishes on the food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Pigging Out
programme.desc: From sweet and salty Cuban sandwiches and zesty whole hog barbecue to mild kielbasa and melt-in-your-mouth cured ham, Andrew Zimmern explores all the best ways we pig out on the world's most popular meat - pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.desc: Emmy Lou meets Jinx the cat and gets the gang to help her find the kitty a new home. The Happy Helpers run Pete's junkyard while he takes his Mama out to lunch for her birthday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mixed-Up for a Day!/ Princess Clarabelle!
programme.desc: A special winner gets mixed-up for the day! When Clarabelle ends up with the hidden royal scepter, everyone in Royalandia thinks she's the new princess!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Vampirina: The Scare Council/Taking Scare of Business
programme.desc: Vee puts a Transylvania twist on Boris’ park idea and presents it to the Board. A family of ghosts stay at the B&B while they finish their business before moving to Haunteray Bay.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Where's Mickey? / Cuckoo in Hot Dog Hills!
programme.desc: Mickey helps Mayor McBeagle install a Flammer Jammer into his car. Cuckoo Loca's cousins visit from Paris.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Animal Antics/ Here, Kitty, Kitty, Kitty!
programme.desc: The gang converts their roadsters into their favorite animals; Heist's kitty runs away.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Desert Pups/ Okavango Odyssey
programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moon Madness
programme.desc: Luna Girl steals the moon crystal to power up her Luna Fortress’ Mega-Magnet, which creates a portal that pulls stuff up from the city. The PJ Masks go off to the moon to stop her!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and Gekko's Robot Rampage/ Owlette's Feathered Friend
programme.desc: When Romeo’s new robot, Robette, gets a screw lose she decides to take over the world by herself. Owlette finds a bird in HQ and decides that she’ll be the perfect pet owner.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: A Very Muppet Babies Christmas/ Summer's Super Fabulous Holiday Surprise
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the playrooms and everyone loves their Secret Santa gifts except Kermit. When a snowstorm cancels Summer's trip home, Piggy brings her traditions to the playroom.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Run Fozzie Run/My Brother Vinny
programme.desc: Fozzie runs away after he accidentally breaks the swing. Rizzo is feeling a little insecure when his superstar singer big brother arrives at the playroom for a visit.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Masks Saves Christmas
programme.desc: When Romeo decides to ruin Christmas for everyone after discovering he's on the naughty list, the PJ Masks partner with Santa Claus to save Christmas!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Owlette and the Owlteenies / Gekko's Blame Campaign
programme.desc: When Night Ninja pushes the Ninjalinos too far, they become Owlette’s new sidekicks. When Greg doesn’t take care of Cameron's mini-car, it goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Elves for a Day/ The Dreidel Dilemma
programme.desc: The Pugs and pals head to the North Pole to help Santa's elves meet the Christmas deadline! When Chloe's special special dreidel gets left at home, Keia asks the Pugs for help!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mystery
programme.desc: Kansas City Mickey sets out to find an ancient mouse-eared stone monument deep in the Hidden Jungle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Happy Mousekeday

programme.title: The Lion Guard: Timon and Pumbaa's Christmas

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Karate Cub/Don't Over Duet
programme.desc: Fozzie must learn some 'Camilla-rate' in order to join the martial arts team, The Kickin' Chickens. Piggy practices her performance for Miss Nanny too hard and loses her voice!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Biggest Heist Ever/ Thrillin' Hilda!
programme.desc: After Von Drake invents a truck to carry all the Roadsters, Commander Heist steals it. Hilda asks the Happy Helpers to help her find a new sport to play.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members in Paris.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy the Homemaker
programme.desc: Goofy along with friends help a baby Red Bird build a birdhouse for him and his family.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Tale

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Babysitter
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake's Tick Tock Time Machine accidentally turns Mickey, Minnie, Donald, Daisy and Pluto into toddlers, Goofy steps in to babysit and gets a little help from Mother Goose Clarabelle.

programme.desc: When Minnie's freshly baked muffins disappear the gang set out to solve the mystery.

programme.desc: Goofy finishes an obstacle course and gets a shiny medal after learning directional skills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Playmate
programme.desc: Mickey and pals teach a visitor some new tricks for his debut in Mickey's Circus.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Puppy Sitting Adventure
programme.desc: Pluto's realizes that baby-sitting Clarabelle Cow's puppy isn't as easy as he thought.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Goofbot
programme.desc: Goofy needs some help building his toy robot for today's Toy Fair.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Saves Santa
programme.desc: Mickey and company save Christmas!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daredevil Goofy!/ The Big Broadcast
programme.desc: Goofy gets a chance to compete against a movie hero in a daredevil competition. Then, the happy helpers cover for Billy Beagle as race announcers while he competes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama
programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Roadsterettes! / Oh Happy Day!
programme.desc: Famous race car driver Pippa Powers visits Hot Dog Hills for a reunion with her old car club. The Happy Helpers must show Mr. McSnorter how to relax on vacation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Snow-Go with the Flow / Happy Helpers on Ice!
programme.desc: Minnie's plans for everyone on a trip to the Swiss Alps are interrupted by the Kai family's first experience with snow!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Garage Alone/ Camp Happy Helpers
programme.desc: When a thief is on the loose, Goofy and Pluto try to protect the garage. The Happy Helpers fill in as counselors for the day at a summer camp.

programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.desc: When Bob asks Bingo and Rolly to protect a snowman he’s building, the pugs make it their mission to keep their new snowy friend as cool as possible.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Five Friends / A Tiny Favor
programme.desc: The dinos have a falling out; after Archie saves Tiny, the little dino must repay the favor and honor the Triceratops Code.

programme.desc: Goofy gets a chance to compete against a movie hero in a daredevil competition. Then, the happy helpers cover for Billy Beagle as race announcers while he competes.

programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.desc: The Pugs and pals head to the North Pole to help Santa's elves meet the Christmas deadline! When Chloe's special special dreidel gets left at home, Keia asks the Pugs for help!

programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Villian of the Sky/Protector of the Sky
programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moth on the Moon/ Fly Me to the Moon
programme.desc: A crystal has hatched a new villain on the moon; Gekko confiscates Luna Girl and Motsuki's powers.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers. Join Ralph, Leo, Donnie and Mikey as they master new weapons, battle absurd mutants and discover a hidden city beneath New York.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Escape From Unwish Island/ The Gland Plan
programme.desc: Timmy's unwished wishes come back for revenge; Cosmo might lose his job as godparent.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Space-CADAD/ Summer Bummer
programme.desc: The Squirrely Scouts go to space to plant a flag in uncharted territory and gain special Flying Squirrely Status. Chloe gives up her summer for research. This upsets her inner child causing her to make crazy sleep wishes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Exchange Student/ Crystal Ball Birthday
programme.desc: When an exchange student comes to visit, he tells a scary story that make the chipmunks think Dave is in danger. Annie and Amber offer to plan Brittany's birthday party, pitting her against Jeanette and Eleanor in the process.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Truth or Cosmoquences/ Beach Bummed
programme.desc: Cosmo wants help impressing people at his reunion; Timmy wishes he were stronger.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Pipe Down/ The Big Scoop
programme.desc: Timmy imposes silence; AJ and Chester try to expose Timmy as a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Boss of Me/ He Poofs, He Scores
programme.desc: Dad takes Timmy to his office on Bring Your Kids to Work Day. Also, Timmy is talented at soccer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ Suds

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2019 Week 15

programme.title: Movie: Peppermint

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: E-Niggma

programme.title: Movie: Mermaids
programme.desc: An unconventional mother is a constant source of embarrassment to her teenage daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Finding Neverland
programme.desc: The story of J.M. Barrie's friendship with the family who inspired his tale of Peter Pan.

programme.title: Movie: Second Act

programme.title: Movie: The Man Who Invented Christmas
programme.desc: After his last few books have flopped, author Charles Dickens is desperate for a hit. When the inspiration for 'A Christmas Carol' strikes, the characters seem to come to life before his eyes as he tries to get the book written in only a few weeks.

programme.title: Movie: A Bad Moms Christmas
programme.desc: Sick of the Christmas chaos, three moms decide to celebrate the holiday in a much more low-key and less stressful fashion this year, but their plans are disrupted when their respective mothers all unexpectedly decide to spend the holiday with them.

programme.title: Movie: Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: Three couples take a week-long vacation to figure out why they got married.

programme.title: Movie: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: After woman who struggles with insecurity and with her own self-image falls and hits her head she wakes up believing that she is incredibly beautiful. Brimming with newfound confidence thanks to her looks, she finds her life transforming around her.

programme.title: Movie: The Girl in the Spider's Web
programme.desc: Lisbeth, the girl with the dragon tattoo, has become a legendary vigilante who hunts men who hurt women, but when she realizes that her latest mission is an elaborate setup an important figure from her past emerges to seek revenge for past mistakes.

programme.title: Movie: Angels and Demons

programme.title: Movie: A Boy. A Girl. A Dream: Love on Election Night

programme.title: Movie: Adventureland

programme.title: Movie: Superfly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Revenge

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mystery in the Closet
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jessica and Matthew Boynton seemed like the picture-perfect couple until the young mother is found unresponsive and covered in blood inside her locked bedroom closet, and doesn't remember how she ended up there.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This

programme.desc: Swarmed by bugs and a lack of food Gary and Karra's survival skills in the arid, desolate savannah region of Brazil are tested. After days of starvation, one of them eats unripe fruit and pays the consequence by becoming desperately ill.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.desc: Ambushed by violent tropical storms, the survivalists are pounded by torrential rain and heavy surf. When one team takes to the open seas they are stalked by territorial sharks. The storms and lack of food brings one survivalist to their breaking point.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Belly of the Beast
programme.desc: With extraction on the other side of the island, and the open sea too dangerous to navigate, the only way out for the survivalists is to go in. But trekking through the thick jungle they must watch out for venomous centipedes, vipers, and monitor lizards.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: No Hand-Outs
programme.desc: A survivalist on a hunting expedition is bitten by a snake and requires an emergency medical evacuation. Tensions rise between teams as hunting grounds get territorial. One group scores protein while their neighbors are on the brink of starvation.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Hike Into Hell
programme.desc: A grueling five-mile hike into the snake-filled jungles of the Palawan island pushes the three remaining teams of survivalists. The one-day journey turns into two days of chaos and one survivalist must be medically evacuated from the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Jeff's Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: The group is devastated when two critical survivalists leave the challenge. With just 10 days left before extraction, Jeff is forced to change his survival strategy but a medical emergency quickly has him on the brink of a tap out.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Superclaw

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America

programme.title: Crime Lords of Tokyo

programme.title: The Aryan Brotherhood

programme.title: Tijuana Drug Lords

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Drug: Super Meth

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Abyss
programme.desc: Many of the world's most mysterious abandoned building are hidden underwater and underground. Experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of these strange places, and finally explain why they were deserted.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Red Storm Rising
programme.desc: Two astronauts trapped in the vacuum of space face an agonizing death; the first close up images of Pluto reveal an alien landscape, and residents of Houston struggle to explain videos of unidentified flying lights captured above their city at night.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Gas Giant
programme.desc: Jupiter is hotter than it should be and scientists don't understand why; the Curiosity Rover finds something strange on Mars; detectives turn to NASA for help with a murder cold case.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Revenge of the Fireflies
programme.desc: NASA investigates so called space fireflies that are attacking the brains of astronauts.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Planet Killer
programme.desc: A mission to Mars captures an image of a strange structure on the Red Planet. Files from the first Apollo mission record an eerie sighting on the dark side of the moon. A planet-eating star gives scientists a glimpse of Earth's terrible demise.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Are We Alone?: Black Knight Rises
programme.desc: Mysterious tracks are found on the surface of Mars. Plus, a UFO may have stalked astronauts on the space shuttle Endeavor and on the moon.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Extortion
programme.desc: The Squad believes that prison gang members are running an extortion game when an inmate's family receives violent threats.

programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: American Monster: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: The Laffertys are pillars of the Mormon community, and known as a flawless example of wholesome family values, as seen in these never-before-aired home videos. But an evil is lurking that - decades later - will explode into an unholy double homicide.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party

programme.title: Silent Night, Evil Night

programme.desc: In 2012, 42-year-old Michelle Mockbee's beaten body was found at work. She was wearing her pink sapphire ring, so robbery was ruled out. Employees and her husband Dan were interrogated. The case stalled until video surfaced that blew it wide open.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: When two Yellow Cab drivers are murdered in under a week, the city of Houston is thrown into a frenzy. Detective Fil Waters soon learns that there are recordings of the same female voice luring the drivers to their deaths.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: One Last Goodbye
programme.desc: After breaking free from her controlling ex-husband, single mom Tanya Petro doesn't have much time to date. Until she meets Ron Gibson and falls helplessly in love with him. But just a few months into the relationship, Tanya mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Unlucky Seven
programme.desc: Heather, a grocery store barista, has just began dating her most recent hire, Arturo. But as time goes by, Arturo is unable to hide his dark side. His obsession with Heather comes at the expense of their relationship, his job - and her life.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Mary McIntyre hires Jociel Bulawin to help with her family business. Although his behavior is strange, Mary has no idea that Jociel is obsessed with her. When she fires him she hopes it's the last she will hear from him; but Joci has other ideas.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Rose-Colored Glasses
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Rose moves out of her parents' home, she is excited to expand her horizons. She soon meets 21-year-old Mike who introduces her to the world of punk music and parties. But when he turns violent, Rose gets caught up in his obsessive trap.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets at the Sunshine Motel
programme.desc: Vern Holbrook seemed to have it all: A thriving estate company and a beautiful family. So when this beloved patriarch failed to show up at a meeting with his daughter-in-law, she was concerned.

programme.title: Dateline: While She Was Sleeping: Part 1
programme.desc: The murder of Nancy Phister, an A-lister and socialite in a town famous for its glitzy ski resorts and celebrities, is investigated.

programme.title: Dateline: While She Was Sleeping: Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of Nancy Phister continues.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Tangle
programme.desc: These deadly women liked company when they killed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run

programme.title: Deadly Women: Dumped and Dangerous
programme.desc: When their love life goes sour these Deadly Women take lethal revenge. They are 'Dumped and Dangerous.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Temple of Renovation
programme.desc: The ninjas embrace their inner children when it comes to the kids' bedrooms and play area. Outside, Rob imagines a play area fit for an adventurer with a giant temple, airplane treehouse, splash pad and fountain.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Strike Zone
programme.desc: Rob has big plans to turn the upstairs area into a gamer's paradise, complete with a custom bowling alley, gaming station, bar and private entrance.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A VIP Main Attraction
programme.desc: The family room receives star treatment when the ninjas go all out to renovate the outdated space. Rob adds a home theater system, sliding glass doors and plenty of ice to make this one spectacular space the entire family can enjoy.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Docks and Crocs
programme.desc: The backyard is a hot mess, but Rob has plans to turn the outdoor space into a calm and cool oasis. The ninjas dig out a lounge area and install an ice bar. Things get wild when Wes catches a gator.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Bringing Down the Roof
programme.desc: Bad weather wreaks havoc as Rob and the ninjas install a new roof over the addition and revamp the exterior of the house. Strong winds and heavy rain lead to a close call, but the ninjas hold tight and face the elements head on.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Taking the Heat to the Street
programme.desc: Things heat up when Rob and the ninjas turn the boring, outdated garage into a modern and colorful space complete with solar panels and a solar water heater to power the entire house.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A Rock Star Reveal
programme.desc: Before the big reveal, Rob calls upon style guru Krista to furnish the house and bring her eye for design to each room. The ninjas add a security camera and a water purifier that converts humidity into drinking water. The final reveal turns into a party.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Off the Ranch in Colorado
programme.desc: After choosing possible houses in the Denver region, newlyweds Jennifer and Matt tour the structures with Mike, who shows them how to tell whether a home is a good buy or if it's a house that deserves a "goodbye".

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Eyeing First Home in Englewood
programme.desc: Newlyweds Andie and Pete are ready to buy their first home in Englewood, Colorado. Mike steps in and tours their chosen homes and shows the couple what's worth a good bid and what's worth walking away from.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Trio Hunts for Home in Aurora
programme.desc: In Aurora, Colorado, Mike lends a hand to newlyweds Ambera and Clayton.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: New Home for Single Mom
programme.desc: Mike travels to Denver to help single mom Terrie find the right house for her and her daughters. Mike shows her how to identify any problems or imperfections that could turn the house from a dream home into a nightmare of repairs.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach
programme.desc: Jim and Tina have purchased a 1930s beach cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware for their family. The house has a few charming touches, but a lot of aesthetic and structural issues.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1817 Chopped-Up Kitchen
programme.desc: Brandon, the owner of an 1817 stone house, needs help with his kitchen. The kitchen was converted from a side porch in the 1970s, but the strange layout and the materials don't match the rest of the house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1859 Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited by friends Scott and Melanie to renovate the 1980s kitchen addition on their 1859 farmhouse. The previous owner did his best to preserve some 19th century style, but the layout doesn't work and the features are dated.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Crumbling 1740s Structure
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by Steve and his son Ellis to take on the original 1740s section of their home in Bucks County, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Rundown 1710 Root Cellar
programme.desc: Angie and Tom recruit Jeff and his team to turn their crumbling 1710 root cellar into a welcoming wine cellar.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Saving a 1717 Spring House
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin and his team take on one of their most challenging projects, a dilapidated 1717 spring house. Homeowners Barbara and Joseph want to turn the spring house into a guest house with a writing space for author Barbara.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 'tis The Season
programme.desc: Why save your holiday favorites for the holidays, when you can enjoy them year-round at the fair! Some of your favorite holiday dishes get the carnival eats treatment.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Since Sliced Bread
programme.desc: Get ready for some seriously spectacular sandwiches! Alton Brown relives his childhood with a slaw dog in South Carolina, while Alex Guarnaschelli treks to Nantucket for a terrific turkey sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish

programme.title: Movie: The A-Team

programme.title: Shameless: Adios Gringos
programme.desc: Frank and Liam get wined and dined by potential baby buyers. Carl comes up with a strategy to protect Anne’s family business, and Ian gets on Paula’s bad side. Backed into a corner, Debbie fights to protect Franny from Pepa.

programme.title: Movie: A Bad Moms Christmas

programme.title: The L Word: Generation Q: Less Is More
programme.desc: Bette weathers continued fallout as she prepares for an LGBTQIA Center talk. Shane helps Finley, while Alice is annoyed when the network forces her to bring on a new staff member. Dani and Sophie celebrate good news as Dani begins a new job.

programme.title: Work In Progress: 176, 172, 171
programme.desc: Abby feels out of place when Chris takes her to a hip, sex-positive, queer wonderland; for their second date and has a free therapy session.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: An Irish Lullaby

programme.title: Movie: Windtalkers
programme.desc: During WWII, two U.S. Marines are assigned to protect Navajo Marines. The Navajo Marines used their native language as an unbreakable radio cypher to help with vital communications in the Pacific theatre.

programme.title: Movie: Step Up

programme.title: Sid and Judy

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock

programme.desc: Two families of different backgrounds have to learn to work together despite the odds against them.

programme.title: Movie: The Professor
programme.desc: A college professor begins to live a reckless, rebellious life after being diagnosed with a terminal illness.

programme.title: Movie: Absolute Power

programme.title: Movie: Walking Tall

programme.title: Movie: Holmes & Watson

programme.title: Movie: Hours

programme.title: Dublin Murders

programme.title: Movie: Slaughterhouse Rulez
programme.desc: A sinkhole unleashes horrors upon horrors on a prestigious British boarding school.

programme.title: Movie: Fighting

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way II
programme.desc: When Larry learns that his daughter badly wants a talking bear for Christmas, he's determined to get it for her. Unfortunately, his ex-wife's new husband wants to be the hero of the day, and the two battle it out to get their hands on the in-demand toy.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Brady Sequel
programme.desc: The Brady family is tossed into turmoil when Carol's long-lost husband reappears.

programme.title: Movie: Prime

programme.desc: When Larry learns that his daughter badly wants a talking bear for Christmas, he's determined to get it for her. Unfortunately, his ex-wife's new husband wants to be the hero of the day, and the two battle it out to get their hands on the in-demand toy.

programme.title: Movie: Johnson Family Vacation

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Miracle

programme.title: Movie: Time for You to Come Home for Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Sense, Sensibility and Snowmen
programme.desc: A Christmas enthusiast, and her sister, clash with their latest client, a not-so-jolly toy company CEO.

programme.title: Movie: Angel Falls: A Novel Holiday

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wonderland
programme.desc: An artist is forced to put her life on hold and return home to help her family. While at home, she finds herself working closely with her high-school sweetheart who is desperately searching for a home for his school's Christmas dance.

programme.title: Movie: Angel in the Family
programme.desc: Sisters separated by a lifetime of misunderstandings come together for the holidays.
